incident_details.short_description: Opportunity plugin repeatedly updates record and slows save
incident_details.description: Saving an Opportunity takes more than 20 seconds and plugin trace logs show the same post-update plugin step executing repeatedly for a single save operation.

resolution.root_cause: The post-update plugin updated the same Opportunity record without checking execution depth or whether the target field had already been calculated, causing repeated plugin execution.
resolution_steps: Enabled plugin trace logging and confirmed repeated execution of the OpportunityMarginPlugin step.
Added an execution depth guard to exit when context.Depth is greater than 1.
Limited the plugin step filtering attributes to fields that actually affect margin calculation.
Changed the plugin to update only the calculated margin fields when values changed.
Deployed the updated assembly and verified Opportunity save time returned to normal.
